basic_details.job_title: Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University South Campus has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 18-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Electronics/Physics (with specialization in Electronics) or M.Tech. in VLSI/ Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microwave Electronics with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent CGPA in the Master's degree and valid NET and/or GATE score
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Electronics/Physics (with specialization in Electronics) or M.Tech. in VLSI/ Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microwave Electronics with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent CGPA in the Master's degree and valid NET and/or GATE score

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Delhi University South Campus Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University South Campus Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Electronics/Physics or M.Tech. in VLSI/ Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microwave Electronics with at least 55% marks and a valid NET and/or GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, along with HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position announced by Delhi University South Campus.

faq.question: Q8. Does the recruitment mention any age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
